ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Instrumento tra alcuni de gli academici accettato ne` banchi
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Names mentioned in the text are: Zuane Badoaro, Morlupino Morlupino, Andrea Zorzi, Marc`Antonio Valaresso, Antonio Girardo, Zuane Ulstat `fo del del mag. M. Marco nobile et mercante augustano, Camillo Besalio, Vincenzo Alessandri, Celio Magno, Alessandro Magno,
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
